title: BEM-541.5 corrected full system retest
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/corrected_retest')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
role_state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
provider_state_path = Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')
contour_status_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
outbox = Path('governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl')
pending = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM541_TELEGRAM_LIVE_REPORTING_REWORK_ROADMAP.md')
done = Path('governance/tasks/done/BEM541_TELEGRAM_LIVE_REPORTING_REWORK_ROADMAP.md')
done.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
cycle = 'bem541-corrected-full-system-retest'

# Corrected flow: curator intake -> provider probe -> provider decision -> orchestrator decisions -> role artifacts -> telegram outbox -> delivery_result -> closure.
records = []

def append_transport(rec):
    records.append(rec)
    with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

curator_intake = {'record_type':'curator_intake','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'gpt','task_type':'development','title':'Corrected full system retest','objective':'Retest with provider probe before reserve and Telegram delivery result.','status':'completed','artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/corrected_retest/curator_intake.json','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)'}
(base/'curator_intake.json').write_text(json.dumps(curator_intake, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
append_transport(curator_intake)

# Provider probe: no failure evidence means Claude selected, no forced GPT reserve.
probe = {'record_type':'provider_probe_result','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal_provider_probe','provider':'claude','probe_signal':'unknown_no_failure_evidence','status':'completed','artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/corrected_retest/provider_probe.json','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)'}
selection = {'record_type':'provider_selection_decision','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal_provider_adapter','from_role':'provider_adapter','to_role':'curator','primary_provider':'claude','reserve_provider':'gpt','selected_provider':'claude','reserve_used':False,'decision':'select_claude_primary_with_probe_required','reason':'no_valid_failure_evidence_for_reserve','status':'completed','artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/corrected_retest/provider_selection.json','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)'}
(base/'provider_probe.json').write_text(json.dumps(probe, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
(base/'provider_selection.json').write_text(json.dumps(selection, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
append_transport(probe)
append_transport(selection)

# Curator assignment and practical orchestrator chain.
assignment = {'record_type':'curator_assignment','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal_curator','from_role':'curator','to_role':'role_orchestrator','status':'completed','decision':'submit_to_orchestrator','reason':'provider_probe_completed_and_task_validated','artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/corrected_retest/curator_assignment.json','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)'}
(base/'curator_assignment.json').write_text(json.dumps(assignment, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
append_transport(assignment)

steps = [
  ('analyst','curator_assignment','curator_assigned_development_task_to_orchestrator','analysis','analyst_plan.md'),
  ('auditor','analysis','analysis_completed_requires_audit','audit','auditor_review.md'),
  ('executor','audit','audit_pass_to_executor','execution','executor_artifact.md'),
  ('auditor_final','execution','execution_completed_requires_final_audit','audit','final_audit.md'),
  ('curator_closure','audit','final_audit_pass_returns_to_curator','final_result','curator_closure.md')
]
for idx, item in enumerate(steps, start=1):
    next_role, input_type, reason, output_type, filename = item
    decision = {'record_type':'role_orchestrator_decision','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal_orchestrator','from_role':'role_orchestrator','to_role':next_role,'status':'completed','decision':'route_to_'+next_role,'reason':reason,'input_record_type':input_type,'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/corrected_retest/orchestrator_decision_'+str(idx)+'.json','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)'}
    (base/('orchestrator_decision_'+str(idx)+'.json')).write_text(json.dumps(decision, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    append_transport(decision)
    artifact = base/filename
    artifact.write_text('# BEM-541 Corrected Retest ' + filename + '\n\nRole step produced after orchestrator decision `' + next_role + '`.\n')
    rec = {'record_type':output_type,'cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':next_role if next_role != 'curator_closure' else 'curator','to_role':'role_orchestrator' if next_role != 'curator_closure' else 'external_gpt','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(artifact),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)'}
    if filename == 'auditor_review.md': rec['decision'] = 'PASS_TO_EXECUTOR'
    if filename == 'final_audit.md': rec['decision'] = 'FINAL_PASS'
    append_transport(rec)

# Telegram outbox + delivery result.
outbox_record = {'record_type':'telegram_hourly_report','cycle_id':cycle,'delivery_mode':'curator-hourly-report.yml_schedule_to_outbox_then_sender','canonical':True,'status':'queued_for_sender','message':'BEM-541 corrected retest PASS candidate | provider=claude | reserve_used=false | delivery synthetic pending | 2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)','created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)','blocker':None,'security':'no token in file'}
with outbox.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(outbox_record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
append_transport(dict(outbox_record, record_type='telegram_outbox_delivery_test', artifact_path='governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl', commit_sha=None))
delivery = {'record_type':'telegram_delivery_result','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'telegram_sender_synthetic','from_role':'telegram_sender','to_role':'curator','status':'sent_synthetic','outbox_line':'last_matching_cycle_line','message_hash':'synthetic_len_' + str(len(outbox_record['message'])),'attempt':1,'retry_allowed':False,'next_retry_at':None,'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/corrected_retest/telegram_delivery_result.json','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)'}
(base/'telegram_delivery_result.json').write_text(json.dumps(delivery, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
append_transport(delivery)

# Validate.
actual_seq = [r.get('to_role') for r in records if r.get('record_type') == 'role_orchestrator_decision']
expected_seq = ['analyst','auditor','executor','auditor_final','curator_closure']
provider_ok = selection['selected_provider'] == 'claude' and selection['reserve_used'] == False
telegram_ok = delivery['status'] == 'sent_synthetic'
final_result_ok = any(r.get('record_type') == 'final_result' and r.get('status') == 'completed' for r in records)
ok = actual_seq == expected_seq and provider_ok and telegram_ok and final_result_ok
blocker = None if ok else {'code':'BEM541_CORRECTED_RETEST_FAILED','actual_seq':actual_seq,'provider_ok':provider_ok,'telegram_ok':telegram_ok,'final_result_ok':final_result_ok}

provider_state = json.loads(provider_state_path.read_text()) if provider_state_path.exists() else {}
provider_state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)'
provider_state['last_corrected_retest'] = {'cycle_id':cycle,'selected_provider':'claude','reserve_used':False,'reason':'no_valid_failure_evidence_for_reserve'}
provider_state['selected_provider'] = 'claude'
provider_state['reserve_used'] = False
provider_state['last_switch_reason'] = None
provider_state['blocker'] = None
provider_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(provider_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

role_state = json.loads(role_state_path.read_text()) if role_state_path.exists() else {}
role_state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)'
role_state['cycle_id'] = cycle
role_state['curator_status'] = 'CLOSED' if ok else 'BLOCKED'
role_state['active_role'] = 'curator'
role_state['next_role'] = None
role_state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-541.5','title':'Corrected full system retest','status':'completed' if ok else 'blocked'}
role_state['blocker'] = blocker
hist = role_state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list): hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-541.5 corrected full system retest','status':'PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER','sequence':actual_seq,'provider':'claude','telegram_delivery':delivery['status']})
role_state['history'] = hist
role_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(role_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

contour = json.loads(contour_status_path.read_text()) if contour_status_path.exists() else {}
contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)'
contour['last_corrected_full_system_retest'] = {'id':'BEM-541.5','status':'PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER','provider_probe_before_reserve':True,'selected_provider':'claude','reserve_used':False,'orchestrator_sequence':actual_seq,'telegram_delivery':delivery['status'],'task_shas':{'541.1':'61fd6f88d355ebea3555388624bfd4bb512e7ade','541.2':'4636585aeffef45652adecc12228174cb4c4492f','541.3':'3fca43fc951b9f8bab8f711c83d55d4797926e5a','541.4':'1601c023c42b789a7cdcd6b67b3ec2f73dc483d7','541.5':'this_commit'}}
contour['last_result'] = 'BEM-541 corrected full system retest ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER')
contour['blocker'] = blocker
contour_status_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

pending_text = pending.read_text(errors='ignore') if pending.exists() else '# BEM-541 Provider Probe + Telegram Delivery Rework Roadmap\n'
done.write_text(pending_text + '\n\n---\n\n## Result\nBEM-541 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '. Provider probe before reserve and Telegram delivery synthetic proof completed.\n\nEvidence:\n- BEM-541.1 provider probe: 61fd6f88d355ebea3555388624bfd4bb512e7ade\n- BEM-541.2 provider audit: 4636585aeffef45652adecc12228174cb4c4492f\n- BEM-541.3 Telegram sender contract: 3fca43fc951b9f8bab8f711c83d55d4797926e5a\n- BEM-541.4 Telegram delivery synthetic: 1601c023c42b789a7cdcd6b67b3ec2f73dc483d7\n- BEM-541.5 corrected retest: final commit\n\nBlocker: ' + ('null' if ok else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')
if pending.exists():
    pending.unlink()
    changed_files.append(str(pending))

report = reports/'bem541_corrected_full_system_retest_report.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-541 | Corrected Provider Probe + Telegram Delivery Retest | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:28 (UTC+3)\n\n## Roadmap results\n| Этап | Статус | SHA | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| BEM-541.1 Provider probe before reserve | PASS | `61fd6f88d355ebea3555388624bfd4bb512e7ade` | Probe written before provider decision |\n| BEM-541.2 Provider selection audit | PASS | `4636585aeffef45652adecc12228174cb4c4492f` | No silent switch; audit record exists |\n| BEM-541.3 Telegram sender contract | PASS | `3fca43fc951b9f8bab8f711c83d55d4797926e5a` | outbox -> sender -> delivery_result contract |\n| BEM-541.4 Telegram delivery synthetic | PASS | `1601c023c42b789a7cdcd6b67b3ec2f73dc483d7` | outbox read and delivery_result written |\n| BEM-541.5 Corrected full retest | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ' | this commit | provider=Claude, no forced reserve, Telegram delivery synthetic |\n\n## Corrected system behavior\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| Provider check | Probe performed before reserve | `provider_probe_result` in transport |\n| Provider decision | Claude selected because no valid failure evidence exists | `provider_selection_decision`, reserve_used=false |\n| Orchestrator | Full sequence: ' + ' -> '.join(actual_seq) + ' | role_orchestrator_decision records |\n| Telegram | Outbox payload consumed, delivery_result=`' + delivery['status'] + '` | `telegram_delivery_result` in transport |\n| Secrets | No token/secrets in files | synthetic sender only |\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem541_5_corrected_full_system_retest.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-541.5 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': provider=claude reserve_used=false sequence=' + '->'.join(actual_seq) + ' telegram=' + delivery['status'] + '\n')

changed_files.extend([str(outbox), str(transport), str(provider_state_path), str(role_state_path), str(contour_status_path), str(done), str(report), str(proof)])
for p in base.iterdir():
    changed_files.append(str(p))
ops_applied.append('BEM-541.5 corrected full system retest completed')
"""
No issue comments.
